sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255), encoded_data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Hello World!');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT encode_base64(data) AS base64_data FROM test_table WHERE id <> 2;
SELECT id, encode_base64(data) FROM test_table WHERE data <> encode_base64('Invalid Data');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE encode_base64(data) <> 'RVRpbXQ=' AND data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE encode_base64(data) <> encode_base64('Hello World!') AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE encode_base64(data) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(data) <> 0;
SELECT id, decode_base64(encode_base64(CONVERT(data USING utf8))) AS decoded_data FROM test_table WHERE data <> decode_base64(encode_base64('Hello World!'));
WITH encoded AS (SELECT id, encode_base64(data) AS encoded_data FROM test_table) SELECT id FROM encoded WHERE encoded_data <> 'SGVsbG8gV29ybGQh' ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, encode_base64(data) FROM test_table WHERE NOT (data IS NULL AND id <> 2);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table (ref_id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO temp_table (ref_id, data) SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id FROM test_table a JOIN temp_table b ON a.id <> b.ref_id AND encode_base64(a.data) <> encode_base64(b.data);
SELECT a.id, encode_base64(a.data) AS a_encoded, b.data AS b_data FROM test_table a JOIN temp_table b ON encode_base64(a.data) <> b.data WHERE a.data IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN additional_data VARCHAR(100);
